id.description: The type of the id of any edge of this edge type

in.description: The label of the in-vertex (head) of any edge of this edge type

label.description: The label of any edge of this edge type

out.description: The label of the out-vertex (tail) of any edge of this edge type

properties.description: A list of property types. The types are ordered for the sake of applications in which property order is significant.

edges.description: A unique edge type for each edge label which may occur in a graph

vertices.description: A unique vertex type for each vertex label which may occur in a graph

required.description: Whether the property is required; values may be omitted from a property map otherwise

value.description: The type of a property's value

id.description: The type of the id of any vertex of this vertex type

label.description: The label of any vertex of this vertex type

properties.description: A list of property types. The types are ordered for the sake of applications in which property order is significant.
